author: _shemnon
content: Why not RLP, or CBOR, or ...? I think that shold be part of the rationale other than that nobody proposed RLP.

author: potuz
content: The receivers of the engine messages need to convert it to SSZ already anyway

author: barnabasbusa
content: RLP isn’t faster than ssz. And as potuz said, no matter what format we pick, it’s gonna need to end up in ssz, so we might as well skip straight to it.

author: _shemnon
content: If the supremecy of the SSZ format for the chain data history is the argument that should be in the proposal.  But that is only true for beacon chain, the execution layer is still RLP.  Other than "it is inevitable" why is it inevitable?
